environment_base.subject: Astral Sub-Plane 3, Middle Underlayer
environment_base.style: psychedelic digital art, mathy geometry, bioluminescent
environment_base.color_refs: deep amber #FF6F00, violet-red #8B0046, sea green #2E8B57, oil slick iridescence
environment_base.lighting: no sun, self-emissive objects 40%, liquid shadows pooling
environment_base.atmosphere: crystallization pops, ozone copper scent, warm wax texture

entities.glimmer_swarm: schools of mirror-bright fish-like lights, synchronized spirals, silk brushing texture, aluminum mint taste, high specular reflection, boid algorithm motion
entities.ley_line_eels: translucent ribbons 3-6ft long, violet glowing sensory pits, swimming through phosphorescent rivers, violet #9400D3 accents, emotional turbulence
entities.memory_moths: hand-sized pulsing white triangles, upward-falling dust trails, paper tearing sound, burnt sugar taste, soft glow #FFFAFA
entities.desire_golems: viscous half-formed humanoids, shifting between 2-3 faces, bathroom glass distortion, greasy cold texture, rotting fruit scent #8B4513 #8B0000
entities.resonance_kelp: undulating ribbons jade and amber, bioluminescent 3sec pulses, cool slimy aloe texture, ozone fresh rain scent, underwater physics

phenomena.color_threshold: oil slick iridescence, heat shimmer distortion, soap bubble wall, boundary between grey and color
phenomena.desire_vortex: swirling pool emotional frequency, liquid shadow syrup, gradient deep red to violet, gravity well effect
phenomena.echo_blooms: floating geometric snowflakes, crystallized sound, frozen fireworks, static cling texture, suspended in air
phenomena.geometric_vines: neon green blue wires, 90 degree angles, guitar string tension, 432Hz hum visualization, CAD wireframe aesthetic

shader_specific.viscosity_sim: liquid simulation, 0.45 viscosity, warm water resistance, silicone deformation
shader_specific.shadow_pooling: liquid shadows, syrup flow downhill, emotional residue, viscosity 0.8
shader_specific.formation_noise: crystallization pops, knuckles cracking audio-visual synesthesia
